summary: The vehicle executes a right turn at an intersection while encountering glare from the sun, causing temporary blindness.

events_timeline.event: A black SUV approaches from the left side of the road and turns right into the lane where the ego-vehicle is located.

uncertainties: Glare from the sun may obscure visibility temporarily.

risk_assessment.why: The glare from the sun during the right turn could impair the driver’s vision, increasing the risk of accidents.
